title: The Great Disconnection: 72 Hours That Rewired Reality
subtitle: When the internet vanished, humanity rediscovered itself in unexpected ways

source.title: Wall Street Journal Supply Chain Report

Martinez's Taco Truck Raises Burrito Prices to $47 Due to Cash-Only Rush

symphony_arc.opening: In the digital age's greatest silence, the world's heartbeat shifted from fiber optic pulses to human footsteps.
symphony_arc.development: Markets collapsed, emergency services scrambled, and supply chains froze as humanity's digital nervous system went dark.
symphony_arc.climax: Amid the chaos, something unexpected emerged: neighbors talked to neighbors, families gathered without screens, and communities rediscovered their analog souls.
symphony_arc.resolution: When connection returned, we carried forward the memory of what we'd found in the darkness—that the most important networks were the ones we'd built with our own hands.
